update(T) - Method in interface com.gcu.data.DataAccessInterface
Updates an existing record in the database.
updateProduct(ProductModel) - Method in class com.gcu.business.ProductsBusinessService
Updates the product
updateProduct(ProductModel) - Method in class com.gcu.ProductsController
Handles POST request to update an existing product.
UserEntity - Class in com.gcu.data.entity
This class is used by the data layer to map database rows to Java objects It stores user registration and login information
UserEntity() - Constructor for class com.gcu.data.entity.UserEntity
 
UserEntity(Long, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.gcu.data.entity.UserEntity
 
UserModel - Class in com.gcu.model
This class is used to transfer user data through the application without exposing persistence layer details.
UserModel(Long, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.gcu.model.UserModel
 
UsersBusinessInterface - Interface in com.gcu.business
This interface represents the business layer responsible for user management.
UsersBusinessService - Class in com.gcu.business
 
UsersBusinessService() - Constructor for class com.gcu.business.UsersBusinessService
 
UsersDataService - Class in com.gcu.data
Implements the DataAccessInterface and uses Spring JDBC along with the UsersRepository to interact with the MySQL database.
UsersDataService(UsersRepository, DataSource) - Constructor for class com.gcu.data.UsersDataService
 
UsersRepository - Interface in com.gcu.data.repository
This repository extends CrudRepository and provides custom SQL queries for retrieving users by ID, username, and email.
